account.description: Represents an individual account, which is an organization or person involved with your business (such as customers, competitors, and partners)

attachment.description: Represents a file that a has uploaded and attached to a parent object

case.description: Represents a case, which is a customer issue or problem

contact.description: Represents a contact, which is an individual associated with an account

opportunity.description: Represents an opportunity, which is a sale or pending deal

task.description: Represents a business activity such as making a phone call or other to-do items. In the user interface, and records are collectively referred to as activities.

user.description: Represents a person, which is one user in system

upsert.description: Create a new account, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

getSummary.description: Returns an overview of attachment's metadata

query.description: Execute a SOQL query that returns all the results in a single response

addComment.description: Add a comment to a case

externalId.description: The field to check to see if the account already exists. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

externalIdValue.description: If this value exists in the 'match against' field, update the account. Otherwise create a new one.

company.description: Company of the lead. If person account record types have been enabled, and if the value of Company is null, the lead converts to a person account.

lastname.description: Required. Last name of the contact. Limited to 80 characters.

annualRevenue.description: Estimated annual revenue of the account

city.description: City for the address of the lead

fieldId.description: The ID of the field to add custom field to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: The value to set on custom field

fieldId.description: The ID of the field to add custom field to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: The value to set on custom field

description.description: Text description of the Document. Limit: 255 characters.

firstname.description: First name of the lead. Limited to 40 characters.

hasOptedOutOfEmail.description: Whether the lead doesn’t want to receive email from Salesforce (true) or does (false). Label is Email Opt Out.

hasOptedOutOfFax.description: Whether the lead doesn’t want to receive fax from Salesforce (true) or does (false). Label is Email Opt Out.

industry.description: The website of this account. Maximum of 255 characters.

IsUnreadByOwner.description: Whether true, lead has been assigned, but not yet viewed. See Unread Leads for more information. Label is Unread By Owner.

jigsaw.description: References the ID of a company in Data.com

leadSource.description: Source from which the lead was obtained. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

numberOfEmployees.description: Number of employees at the lead’s company. Label is Employees.

owner.description: ID of the User who owns the attachment. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

postalCode.description: Postal code for the address of the lead. Label is Zip/Postal Code.

recordTypeId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

salutation.description: Honorific abbreviation, word, or phrase to be used in front of name in greetings, such as Dr. or Mrs.

state.description: State for the address of the lead

status.description: The status of the case, such as “New,” “Closed,” or “Escalated.” This field directly controls the IsClosed flag. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

street.description: Street number and name for the address of the lead

title.description: Title of the contact such as CEO or Vice President

website.description: The website of this account. Maximum of 255 characters.

acconuntId.description: ID of the account that is the parent of this contact. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

Assistant Phone.description: The telephone number of the assistant

birthdate.description: The birth date of the contact

emailBouncedReason.description: If bounce management is activated and an email sent to the contact bounces, the reason the bounce occurred

firstName.description: First name of the contact. Maximum size is 40 characters.

homePhone.description: Home telephone number for the contact

fileExtension.description: File extension to use. If none is set, the value from the binary data will be used.

linkToObjectId.description: ID of the object you want to link this document to

ownerId.description: ID of the owner of this document. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

accountId.description: ID of the account associated with this case

campaignId.description: ID of the campaign that needs to be fetched. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

forecastCategoryName.description: It is implied, but not directly controlled, by the StageName field

nextStep.description: Description of next task in closing opportunity. Limit: 255 characters.

pricebook2Id.description: ID of a related Pricebook2 object

probability.description: Percentage of estimated confidence in closing the opportunity

type.description: Represents Type of the task, such as Call or Meeting. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

accountNumber.description: Account number assigned to this account (not the unique ID). Maximum size is 40 characters.

accountSource.description: The source of the account record. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

billingCity.description: Details for the billing address of this account. Maximum size is 40 characters.

billingCountry.description: Details for the billing address of this account. Maximum size is 80 characters.

billingPostalCode.description: Details for the billing address of this account. Maximum size is 20 characters.

billingState.description: Details for the billing address of this account. Maximum size is 80 characters.

billingStreet.description: Street address for the billing address of this account

parentId.description: ID of the parent object, if any

sicDesc.description: A brief description of an organization’s line of business, based on its SIC code

shippingCity.description: Details of the shipping address for this account. City maximum size is 40 characters.

shippingCountry.description: Details of the shipping address for this account. Country maximum size is 80 characters.

shippingPostalCode.description: Details of the shipping address for this account. Postal code maximum size is 20 characters.

shippingState.description: Details of the shipping address for this account. State maximum size is 80 characters.

shippingStreet.description: The street address of the shipping address for this account. Maximum of 255 characters.

isEscalated.description: Whether indicates whether the case has been escalated (true) or not

origin.description: The source of the case, such as Email, Phone, or Web. Label is Case Origin. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

ParentId.description: The ID of the parent case in the hierarchy. The label is Parent Case.

priority.description: Indicates the importance or urgency of a task, such as high or low. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

reason.description: The reason why the case was created, such as Instructions not clear, or User didn’t attend training. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

subject.description: The subject line of the task, such as “Call” or “Send Quote.” Limit: 255 characters. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

suppliedCompany.description: The company name that was entered when the case was created. This field can't be updated after the case has been created..

suppliedEmail.description: The email address that was entered when the case was created. This field can't be updated after the case has been created.

suppliedName.description: The name that was entered when the case was created. This field can't be updated after the case has been created.

suppliedPhone.description: The phone number that was entered when the case was created. This field can't be updated after the case has been created.

activityDate.description: Represents the due date of the task. This field has a timestamp that is always set to midnight in the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) time zone.

callDisposition.description: Represents the result of a given call, for example, “we'll call back,” or “call unsuccessful.” Limit is 255 characters. Not subject to field-level security, available for any user in an organization with Salesforce CRM Call Center.

callDurationInSeconds.description: Duration of the call in seconds. Not subject to field-level security, available for any user in an organization with Salesforce CRM Call Center.

callObject.description: Name of a call center. Limit is 255 characters. Not subject to field-level security, available for any user in an organization with Salesforce CRM Call Center.

callType.description: The type of call being answered: Inbound, Internal, or Outbound. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

isReminderSet.description: Whether a popup reminder has been set for the task (true) or not (false)

recurrenceType.description: Recurrence Type of the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

recurrenceInstance.description: The frequency of the recurring task. For example, “2nd” or “3rd.”. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

recurrenceDayOfMonth.description: The day of the month in which the task repeats

recurrenceDayOfWeekMask.description: The day or days of the week on which the task repeats. This field contains a bitmask. The values are as follows: Sunday = 1 Monday = 2 Tuesday = 4 Wednesday = 8 Thursday = 16 Friday = 32 Saturday = 64 Multiple days are represented as the sum of their numerical values. For example, Tuesday and Thursday = 4 + 16 = 20.

recurrenceEndDateOnly.description: The date when the recurring task begins. Must be a date and time before RecurrenceEndDateOnly.

recurrenceMonthOfYear.description: The month of the year in which the task repeats

recurrenceRegeneratedType.description: Represents what triggers a repeating task to repeat. Add this field to a page layout together with the RecurrenceInterval field, which determines the number of days between the triggering date (due date or close date) and the due date of the next repeating task in the series. Label is Repeat This Task.

recurrenceTimeZoneSidKey.description: The time zone associated with the recurring task. For example, “UTC-8:00” for Pacific Standard Time.

reminderDateTime.description: Represents the time when the reminder is scheduled to fire, if IsReminderSet is set to true. If IsReminderSet is set to false, then the user may have deselected the reminder checkbox in the Salesforce user interface, or the reminder has already fired at the time indicated by the value.

whatId.description: The WhatId represents nonhuman objects such as accounts, opportunities, campaigns, cases, or custom objects. WhatIds are polymorphic. Polymorphic means a WhatId is equivalent to the ID of a related object.

whoId.description: The WhoId represents a human such as a lead or a contact. WhoIds are polymorphic. Polymorphic means a WhoId is equivalent to a contact’s ID or a lead’s ID.

isPrivate.description: Whether this record is viewable only by the owner and administrators (true) or viewable by all otherwise-allowed users (false)

leadId.description: ID of lead that needs to be fetched

annualRevenue.description: Estimated annual revenue of the account

city.description: City for the address of the lead

company.description: Company of the lead. If person account record types have been enabled, and if the value of Company is null, the lead converts to a person account.

value.description: The value to set on custom field

field.description: For date, number, or boolean, please use expressions. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

owner.description: ID of the user who owns the note. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

ownerId.description: ID of the user who owns the note. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

commentBody.description: Text of the CaseComment. The maximum size of the comment body is 4,000 bytes. Label is Body.

isPublished.description: Whether the CaseComment is visible to customers in the Self-Service portal (true) or not (false)

jsonParameters.description: Whether the input variables should be set via the value-key pair UI or JSON/RAW
